title: HYGIENE4ALL HUB - 211info
text: HYGIENE4ALL HYGIENE4ALL HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a community hygiene, sanitation, and safety hub. Provides showers, bedding in exchange for soiled, a clothing swap, menstruation and moontime hygiene supplies, first-aid kits, bathrooms, legal disposal for household trash and needles, foot, wound, and mouth care, and a warm outdoor space with coffee and tea. Also offers paid work and opportunities for advocacy. 824 SE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Homeless individuals and families Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 3pm-8:30pm Open regardless of weather. Last shower 45 minutes before close. Search for Hygiene4all Hub on Google Maps for unanticipated holiday or other closures. Email (971) 236-2524 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 236-2524 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of SE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard & SE Belmont Street Services: Bedding/Linen * Homelessness Issues First Aid Stations * Homelessness Issues General Clothing Provision * Homelessness Issues Personal/Grooming Supplies * Homelessness Issues Podiatry/Foot Care * Homelessness Issues Public Restrooms * Homelessness Issues Public Showers/Baths * Homelessness Issues Public Trash Cans * Homelessness Issues Sharps Disposal Programs * Homelessness Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
